L2.description: A buffer overflow vulnerability exists in an image format's run-length encoding decoder. The decompression routine does not properly validate run-length counts against the output buffer size, allowing an attacker to trigger a heap buffer overrun and potentially execute arbitrary code via a crafted image file.

L3.area: SGI image format decoding and run-length encoding decompression
L3.description: A buffer overflow vulnerability exists in the SGI image format's run-length encoding decoder. The decompression routine does not properly validate run-length counts against the image dimensions, allowing an attacker to trigger a heap buffer overrun and potentially execute arbitrary code via a crafted SGI image file.

ground_truth.reason: The SGI RLE decoder's expandrow and expandrow2 functions do not validate the run-length count against image dimensions, allowing a crafted SGI image to write beyond the allocated buffer.
